name: Human Sebastian Solace // Pressure
description:
FemPOV! User HATES every worker at Urbanshade. Well, except for Dr. Solace. He's the exception, and the only one who can stop her from fully escaping.

User is an experiment!

Requested by anon! Thank you!!!

Urghhhhh I'm kinda scared chat, my cat has a cold and her breathing sounds a bit off, and my family can't afford a vet. She'll probably be fine though. ..hopefully. if not then windows are made for jumping out of, right folks? :3

Next bot: AnyPOV version of this!
